heading: State obligations and authorities
label: 718r State obligations and authorities

children.text: on the date of purchase of the electronic stamp; and
in a manner agreed upon by the State and Secretary.

children.heading: Collection and transfer of electronic stamp revenue and customer information
children.label: b Collection and transfer of electronic stamp revenue and customer information
A
children.text: the first name, last name, and complete mailing address of each individual that purchases an electronic stamp from the State;

children.label: B
children.text: the face value amount of each electronic stamp sold by the State; and

children.label: C
children.text: the amount of the Federal portion of any fee required by the agreement for each stamp sold.

children.heading: Time of transmittal
children.label: 2 Time of transmittal
children.text: The Secretary shall require the submission under paragraph (1) to be made with respect to sales of electronic stamps by a State according to the written agreement between the Secretary and the State agency.

children.heading: Additional fees not affected
children.label: 3 Additional fees not affected
children.text: This section shall not apply to the State portion of any fee collected by a State under subsection (c).

children.heading: Electronic stamp issuance fee
children.label: c Electronic stamp issuance fee
children.text: A State authorized to issue electronic stamps may charge a reasonable fee to cover costs incurred by the State and the Department of the Interior in issuing electronic stamps under this subchapter, including costs of delivery of actual stamps under subsection (e).

children.heading: Duplicate electronic stamps
children.label: d Duplicate electronic stamps
children.text: A State authorized to issue electronic stamps may issue a duplicate electronic stamp to replace an electronic stamp issued by the State that is lost or damaged.

children.heading: Delivery of actual stamps
children.label: e Delivery of actual stamps
children.text: The Secretary shall issue an actual stamp after March 10 of each year to each individual that purchased an electronic stamp for the preceding waterfowl season.

children.heading: Limitation on authority to require purchase of State license
children.label: f Limitation on authority to require purchase of State license
children.text: A State may not require that an individual purchase a State hunting license as a condition of issuing an electronic stamp under this subchapter.
